verification.detail: Kernel executed on Model/Ascend910B1, verification passed

notes: Golden kernel verified on CANN 9.0.0 simulator in Docker. Single-vector-lane streaming pattern with float32 accumulator: tile_cols=64 (one Ascend910B1 SIMD lane), host-side zero padding to a multiple of tile_cols, multi-core (CORE_NUM=16) row distribution, x and gamma loaded as float16 then cast via .to(asc.float32) inside the inner loop and cast back via .to(x.dtype) before asc2.store. Both num_rows and num_cols are runtime int. Test shape (8, 1055) — non-aligned num_cols exercises the host-padding tail path. Tolerances atol=rtol=5e-2.
